ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the applicant's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the applicant (e.g., administrator, admissions staff, applicant) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the applicant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the applicant account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the applicant account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who submitted the application */,
  "gre_score" REAL /* GRE score of the applicant */,
  "toefl_score" REAL /* TOEFL score of the applicant */,
  "university_rating" REAL /* Rating of the applicant's university */,
  "sop" REAL /* SOP score of the applicant */,
  "lor" REAL /* LOR score of the applicant */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* CGPA of the applicant */,
  "research" INTEGER /* Research experience of the applicant (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university to which the application is submitted */,
  "degree_program" TEXT /* Degree program the applicant is applying for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the admission decision was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission outcome */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with the admission outcome */,
  "admission_status" TEXT /* Status of the admission (e.g., admitted, rejected, pending) */,
  "predicted_chance" REAL /* Predicted chance of admission for the applicant */,
  "decision_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admissions staff member who made the decision */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admission outcome was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admission outcome was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_decision_by FOREIGN KEY ("decision_by") REFERENCES admissions_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the university */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the university is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the university */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admissions staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the admissions staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admissions staff member */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the admissions staff member's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admissions staff member (e.g., senior, junior) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the admissions staff member belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staff account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staff account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "gre_score" REAL /* GRE score of the admitted student */,
  "toefl_score" REAL /* TOEFL score of the admitted student */,
  "university_rating" REAL /* Rating of the admitted student's university */,
  "sop" REAL /* SOP score of the admitted student */,
  "lor" REAL /* LOR score of the admitted student */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* CGPA of the admitted student */,
  "research" INTEGER /* Research experience of the admitted student (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "admission_status" TEXT /* Admission status of the admitted student */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "degree_program" TEXT /* Degree program of the admitted student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_model" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the prediction model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
